item.title: Patriots Set to Release WR Stefon Diggs Following Productive 2025 Season
item.description: The Patriots are moving on from Stefon Diggs after one season.

item.title: Get to Know a College Basketball Mid-Major: Atlantic Sun
item.description: A look at who's who and what they are playing for in the men's and women's college basketball mid-major Atlantic Sun.

item.title: INDYCAR, NASCAR Drivers Pick All-Time Favorites From Opposite Series
item.description: Ahead of this weekend's Phoenix doubleheader, we asked INDYCAR & NASCAR drivers who their favorites are across the opposite series.
